title: Rapicactus × anomalus
taxonomy: Rapicactus × anomalus is classified as a hybrid cactus, specifically a cross between Rapicactus and another species within the Cactaceae family. The name Rapicactus × anomalus suggests that it is a hybrid of Rapicactus and a species with an anomalous or unusual characteristic. The classification of hybrid cacti like Rapicactus × anomalus can be complex due to the numerous species within the Cactaceae family. In general, hybrids are classified as a combination of the parent species' names, indicating their mixed genetic makeup. This hybrid classification system helps botanists and researchers understand the relationships between different plant species within the Cactaceae family.
